---
title: "About"
---
:::{.columns}
:::{.column width="60%"}
Hello! I am a Ph.D. candidate and applied microeconomist in the Economics Department at the University of Wisconsin-Madison. I am also an Innovation Policy Lab Fellow for the Congressional Research Service within the Library of Congress.

My research examines how social and public policy affect individual well-being, with a focus on urban and criminal justice policy. 
:::

:::{.column width="40%"}
![](Daniels-Mary-16.jpg){fig-align="center" width="40%"}
:::
:::
